title: Co-Immunoprecipitation/Pull-Down of C1q-Interacting Intracellular Proteins/Protein Complexes for Unbiased Forward Screen Using NanoLC-MS/MS
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9qmf0","text":"Co-immunoprecipitation/pull-down of C1q-interacting intracellular\nproteins/protein complexes using cell membrane-permeable biotin and crosslinker for an unbiased forward screen using nanoLC-MS/MS.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"eox66","text":"- Human C1q (MyBioSource, MBS147305)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"na0po","text":"- Zeba spin desalting column (7K MWCO, ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ubowq","text":"- NHS-SS-Biotin (ThermoScientific, PI21441)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"s5lmn","text":"- PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ojhdh","text":"- BCA analysis kit","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xr0w2","text":"- Poly-L-ornithine and laminin coated 6-well plates","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"49og3","text":"- DSP (ThermoScientific, PI22586)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gcc0z","text":"- Pierce IP lysis buffer (ThermoScientific, PI87787)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"idurs","text":"- Pierce Streptavidin Magnetic beads (ThermoScientific, PI188816)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lrmne","text":"- Protease and phosphatase inhibitors","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Resuspend 1 mg of purified human C1q (MyBioSource, MBS147305) in 1 mL Milli-Q H2O (resulting in 1 mg/mL concentration).
Buffer exchange 500 µg of C1q to PBS using a Zeba spin desalting column (7K MWCO, ThermoFisher Scientific), following the manufacturer's instructions.

Incubate C1q in PBS (1.25 nM) with a 20-fold molar excess (25 nM) of NHS-SS-Biotin using the Ez-link NHS-SS-Biotinylation kit (ThermoScientific, PI21441) for 1 hour at room temperature with agitation.
Perform a buffer exchange using a Zeba spin desalting column (7K MWCO, ThermoFisher Scientific) to achieve a final volume of 500 µL.
Use a 10 µL aliquot (1:30 dilution) for BCA analysis to determine C1q protein concentration.
Expect a recovery of 60-80% of the original C1q amount after biotinylation.
Analyze an aliquot of biotinylated C1q by Western blot to confirm successful biotinylation.
Grow hNSC as a monolayer on poly-L-ornithine and laminin coated 6-well plates until 80% confluence.
Wash the cells three times with PBS (pH 7.2).
Add 200 nM of biotinylated C1q (bait) or an equal volume of growth medium (non-treated control) to the cells.
Incubate for 15 or 30 minutes at room temperature.
Wash cells three times with PBS (pH 7.2) and add 2 mM cell-permeable DSP on the cells (ThermoScientific, PI22586) for 30 minutes at room temperature.
Quench the reaction with three 5-minute washes of 25 mM Tris in PBS.
Lyse cells using Pierce IP lysis buffer (ThermoScientific, PI87787), supplemented with protease and phosphatase inhibitors, on ice.
Centrifuge lysates at 13,000g for 10 minutes at 4°C.
Incubate supernatants with washed Pierce Streptavidin Magnetic beads (ThermoScientific, PI188816) for 1 hour under slow, low-speed rotation at room temperature.
Wash to remove non-specific binding partners.
See the “Denaturing On-bead Digestion for LC-MS/MS”-protocol compatible with this crosslinking method for next steps.
creator: Katja Piltti
